description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-code-snippet` (T3-13) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-code-snippet/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, language typed, copy-to-clipboard prop typed, line numbers prop typed
2. Accessibility — code block uses `<pre><code>` semantics, copy button has accessible label + success state announced, keyboard operable copy, syntax highlighting doesn't break screen reader reading, axe-core pass
3. Tests — copy to clipboard, language display, line numbers, overflow scroll, expand/collapse for long snippets, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — multiple languages, with/without line numbers, copy demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens for code colors (monospace font token), CSS parts (code, copy-btn, header)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (no bundled syntax highlighter — use CSS or minimal approach)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-code-snippet/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-code-snippet — T3-13 antagonistic quality review
